title: Valle del Jerte
summary:
Valle del Jerte is a comarca and mancomunidad in the province of Cáceres, Spain.  It contains the following municipalities:

Barrado
Cabezuela del Valle
Cabrero
Casas del Castañar
El Torno
Jerte
Navaconcejo
Piornal
Rebollar
Tornavacas
Valdastillas
